resources.string: HandsOff needs Shizuku access to remove bloatware and apply privacy settings without root access.
Block trackers, mic & camera access. Privacy for everyone.

HandsOff is a universal Android privacy guardian — no root required.

 • Blocks 250+ ad tracking and spyware domains via a local VPN (your traffic never leaves your device)
 • Detects and blocks microphone access in real time
 • Detects and blocks camera access in real time
 • Alerts you when any app gains dangerous permissions after an update
 • Works on every Android device running Android 8+

 HandsOff is open source, zero-telemetry, and never connects to external servers. Privacy is a human right. Not a privilege.
Initial release — tracker blocking, mic/camera detection, and permission watchdog.
